question: Develop a C++ program that continuously prompts the user to enter integers until a negative number is entered. After a negative number is input, display the sum of all the positive numbers that were entered. Use a do-while loop.

test_cases.expected:
Enter integers. The program will stop when a negative number is entered.
Only positive numbers will be summed.
Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: The sum of all positive numbers entered is: 6

Enter integers. The program will stop when a negative number is entered.
Only positive numbers will be summed.
Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: The sum of all positive numbers entered is: 300

Enter integers. The program will stop when a negative number is entered.
Only positive numbers will be summed.
Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: The sum of all positive numbers entered is: 5

Enter integers. The program will stop when a negative number is entered.
Only positive numbers will be summed.
Please enter an integer: The sum of all positive numbers entered is: 0

Enter integers. The program will stop when a negative number is entered.
Only positive numbers will be summed.
Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: Please enter an integer: The sum of all positive numbers entered is: 7
